verdicts.verdict_greek: Καὶ ἐκάλεσεν Τωβίας τὸν Ῥαφαὴλ καὶ εἶπεν αὐτῷ Ἀζαρία ἀδελφέ,
verdicts.reasoning: On page 835 at IX 1 the main B-text clearly continues after αὐτῷ with Ἀζαρία ἀδελφέ, matching A against the truncated B reading.

verdicts.verdict_greek: διότι ὠμόμοκεν ὁ Ῥαγουὴλ μὴ ἐξελθεῖν με·
verdicts.reasoning: On page 836 at IX 3 the B-text reads ὠμόμοκεν with initial omega and includes the article ὁ before Ῥαγουήλ, agreeing with A rather than B.

verdicts.verdict_greek: Καὶ ἐκάλεσεν Τωβίας τὸν Ῥαφαὴλ καὶ εἶπεν αὐτῷ Ἀζαρία ἀδελφέ,
verdicts.reasoning: On p. 835 at IX 1 the main text clearly continues after αὐτῷ with Ἀζαρία ἀδελφέ, matching A; the longer form also accords with Cambridge LXX/Tischendorf’s Vaticanus-based tradition here.

verdicts.verdict_greek: διότι ὠμόμοκεν ὁ Ῥαγουὴλ μὴ ἐξελθεῖν με·
verdicts.reasoning: On p. 836 at IX 3 Swete prints διότι ὠμόμοκεν ὁ Ῥαγουὴλ μὴ ἐξελθεῖν με, with article ὁ and omega with smooth breathing as in A; this differs from Rahlfs’ eclectic spelling and is supported by the diplomatic Vaticanus lineation.

notes: Adjudicated from Swete pp. 835–836 (Tobit IX 1, 3), using the upper B-text only.
